title: 8 Herbal Teas for Poor Oral Hygiene with Periodontal Disease
description: Echinacea purpurea teas have shown promise in helping to combat periodontal disease, a bacterial infection of the gums and bones that support the teeth. The teas contain compounds like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and chicoric acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties may help reduce the severity of periodontal disease by decreasing inflammation and preventing the growth of bacteria that cause the infection.
